subject: refactor(theme): simplify to pure extraction — no heuristics, no manual lists
body:
Script now does exactly two things:
1. Reads DaisyUI's color-scheme to classify light/dark (no manual lists)
2. Extracts primary hex (light) or base-100 hex (dark) — no neutral
   fallbacks, no luminance checks, no judgment calls

Generates: META_COLORS, LIGHT_THEMES/DARK_THEMES arrays, bootstrap lt/dt
arrays, navbar button sections, and initial meta tag values. All from
DaisyUI's theme objects as single source of truth.

Tags: pwa, theme, build, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-theme-color
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JrL2asTpesrUXcPYxuGUKw
